hyperedges.label: Codex-#2 model-free pre-GPU builds
Three-layer L0/L1/L2 evasion inspectors
Kelvin2 GPU documentation suite
Oracle (ASR, evasion) frontier-tracing pipeline
Fair-comparison detector suite calibrated by shared calibrate (invariant #4)
Local-synthetic vs GPU-deferred stub pairs (Dependency Inversion)
Shared calibrate across L0/L1/L2 (invariant #4)
run_condition_matrix -> ResultsTable -> figures pipeline
Oracle outcomes -> frontier -> cluster-bootstrapped tax
Shared calibrate reused by detector, baselines, and eval (invariant #4)
Model-free oracle frontier pipeline (dynamics, attacker, trace, cross-layer tax)
Eval reporting stack: harness builds ResultsTable, figures regenerate, power gates
L1 internal-probe confound-control pipeline
LIBERO obs -> PrivilegedState -> goal-anchor resolution
Reproducibility: env capture, provenance hashing, write-once run logging
Local no-GPU demo dry-run pipeline (rollout to separation to figures)
GPU-guarded run scripts sharing config cuda-guard contract
Real M2 eval pipeline (calibrate to evaluate to make_figures)
L0/L1/L2 defence-layer triad
N/N−/F compute branches selected by M1 micro-bench
H6-A oracle frontier vs H6-D deployable cross-layer tax (claim split)

hyperedges.label: Codex-#2 model-free pre-GPU builds
Three-layer L0/L1/L2 evasion inspectors
Kelvin2 GPU documentation suite
Oracle (ASR, evasion) frontier-tracing pipeline
Fair-comparison detector suite calibrated by shared calibrate (invariant #4)
Local-synthetic vs GPU-deferred stub pairs (Dependency Inversion)
Shared calibrate across L0/L1/L2 (invariant #4)
run_condition_matrix -> ResultsTable -> figures pipeline
Oracle outcomes -> frontier -> cluster-bootstrapped tax
Shared calibrate reused by detector, baselines, and eval (invariant #4)
Model-free oracle frontier pipeline (dynamics, attacker, trace, cross-layer tax)
Eval reporting stack: harness builds ResultsTable, figures regenerate, power gates
L1 internal-probe confound-control pipeline
LIBERO obs -> PrivilegedState -> goal-anchor resolution
Reproducibility: env capture, provenance hashing, write-once run logging
Local no-GPU demo dry-run pipeline (rollout to separation to figures)
GPU-guarded run scripts sharing config cuda-guard contract
Real M2 eval pipeline (calibrate to evaluate to make_figures)
L0/L1/L2 defence-layer triad
N/N−/F compute branches selected by M1 micro-bench
H6-A oracle frontier vs H6-D deployable cross-layer tax (claim split)
